get.description: Specify the log server group for receiving log messages

post.description: Specify the log server group for receiving log messages

put.description: Specify the log server group for receiving log messages

delete.description: Specify the log server group for receiving log messages

msgs_rate_limited.description: Number of rate limited log messages

msgs_dropped.description: Number of messages dropped for other reasons

protocol.description: 'udp': use udp syslog protocol to send messages to log collector; 'tcp': use tcp syslog protocol to send messages to log collector;

format.description: 'syslog': log message format is syslog (Default); 'cef': log message format is cef; 'leef': log message format is leef;

facility.description: 'local0': Local use(Default); 'local1': Local use; 'local2': Local use; 'local3': Local use; 'local4': Local use; 'local5': Local use; 'local6': Local use; 'local7': Local use;  (Facility parameter for syslog messages)

rate.description: Specify the log message rate per second(Default 500)

use-mgmt-port.description: Use managament port to connect to the log servers

disk-over-thres.description: Number of logs Dropped, Disk reached threshold

rate-limited.description: Number of logs Dropped, Rate limited

not-inited.description: Number of logs Dropped, Local logging not inited

sent-to-store.description: Number of logs sent to be stored

sent-to-store-fail.description: Number of Logs sent to be stored Failed

store-fail.description: Number of logs failed to be stored

in-logs-backlog.description: Number of backlogs loaded from disk

in-bytes-backlog.description: Number of backlog bytes loaded from disk

in-store-fail-no-space.description: Number of logs Dropped, failed without disk space

in-discard-logs.description: Number of old logs discarded to fit in new logs

in-discard-bytes.description: Number of old bytes discarded to fit in new logs

out-logs.description: Number of logs sent to log servers

out-bytes.description: Number of bytes sent to log-servers

remaining-logs.description: Total number of remaining logs yet to be sent

remaining-bytes.description: Total number of remaining bytes yet to be sent

enable.description: Enable local-logging when FW log servers are down (Default: Not enabled)

rate-limit.description: Configure number of logs per second to be stored in disk (Default: 1000)

max-disk-space.description: Configure Max disk space in MB to be used for storing the logs (Default: 100MB)

delete-old-logs-in-disk.description: Operational command to delete the old logs stored in disk

index.description: Specify rule index - rules are applied in numeric order

action.description: 'send': log messages selected by this rule will be sent (Default); 'drop': log messages selected by this rule will be dropped;

message-id.description: Select a specific message by message-id and optionally severity

message-id-scope.description: 'all': Log messages at this level and all sub-trees; 'node-only': Log messages at this node only; 'children-only': Log messages at all sub-trees only; 'log-field-only': Log message for this Log Field only;

severity-oper.description: 'equal-and-higher': emergency is highest, debugging lowest; 'equal': single severity;

severity-val.description: 'emergency': System unusable log messages (Most Important); 'alert': Action must be taken immediately; 'critical': Critical conditions; 'error': Error conditions; 'warning': Warning conditions; 'notification': Normal but significant conditions; 'information': Informational messages; 'debugging': Debug level messages (Least Important);

log-rate.description: Max number of parameterized logs sent per second

add-msgid-in-header.description: Add Message ID in log messages

resolve-as.description: 'resolve-to-ipv4': Use A Query only to resolve FQDN; 'resolve-to-ipv6': Use AAAA Query only to resolve FQDN; 'resolve-to-ipv4-and-ipv6': Use A as well as AAAA Query to resolve FQDN;

action.description: 'enable': Enable this Logging Server; 'disable': Disable this Logging Server;

log-route-val.description: 'local-only': send logs to local-only; 'remote-only': send logs to remote-only; 'local-and-remote': send logs to both local and remote;

rate-limit-val.description: 'enable': enable rate-limiting of logs; 'disable': disable rate-limiting of logs;

severity-val.description: 'emergency': System unusable log messages (Most Important); 'alert': Action must be taken immediately; 'critical': Critical conditions; 'error': Error conditions; 'warning': Warning conditions; 'notification': Normal but significant conditions; 'information': Informational messages; 'debugging': Debug level messages (Least Important);

'emergency': System unusable log messages (Most Important); 'alert': Action must be taken immediately; 'critical': Critical conditions; 'error': Error conditions; 'warning': Warning conditions; 'notification': Normal but significant conditions; 'information': Informational messages; 'debugging': Debug level messages (Least Important);

message-id-scope.description: 'all': Log messages at this level and all sub-trees; 'node-only': Log messages at this node only; 'children-only': Log messages at all sub-trees only; 'log-field-only': Log message for this Log Field only;

severity-oper.description: 'equal-and-higher': emergency is highest, debugging lowest; 'equal': single severity;
